decisions.title: Ship Global Navigation Redesign to Production
decisions.context: New global top nav (ENG-9872) and left nav sidebar (ENG-9654, ENG-9882) are in development. This represents a significant UX shift that affects all users. Need to decide on rollout strategy and gates.

arguments.for: Modernizes UI, improves navigation, supports Embed Deeper pillar by making features more discoverable
arguments.against: Risk of user disruption, requires comprehensive testing across all workflows, may delay other Canvas/Explore V2 features

decisions.title: Prioritize Sift Edge GUI Table View vs Core Platform Scale
decisions.context: ENG-9883 (Edge GUI) competes with critical scale work (ENG-9778 load testing, ENG-9659 memtable improvements, ENG-8898 run bounds). Edge is new product; scale affects all customers.

arguments.for: Edge GUI unlocks new market segment, differentiates from competition, aligns with Build the Moat
arguments.against: Scale issues (65k entry failures ENG-9837, load testing needs) directly impact Nail the Core and customer retention

decisions.title: FedRAMP Compliance Timeline and Resource Allocation
decisions.context: ENG-9662 identifies FedRAMP requirements for Amplitude. This likely extends to entire platform. Critical for government/defense customers but resource-intensive.
decisions.blockedBy: Full scope assessment of FedRAMP requirements across all services not yet complete

arguments.for: Opens federal market, major revenue opportunity, competitive moat in aerospace/defense vertical
arguments.against: Months-long effort, diverts from roadmap, may require architectural changes affecting all products

decisions.title: Canvas Run Hierarchy UX Model Finalization
decisions.context: Multiple signals around candidate runs (ENG-9530, ENG-9533, ENG-9534) and canvas hierarchy (ENG-9506). Need to lock UX pattern before broader rollout.

arguments.for: Enables complex multi-run workflows, key differentiator for Canvas product, supports Decisions Captured metric
arguments.against: UX complexity may confuse users, still iterating on patterns, risks Canvas GA timeline

decisions.title: CSRS Migration: Full Cutover Date
decisions.context: ENG-9494 and ENG-9457 show CSRS work ongoing (shadow traffic, caching). Need to decide when to fully migrate from legacy system.

arguments.for: Performance improvements, cost savings, enables future scale improvements
arguments.against: Risk of data inconsistencies, requires extensive validation, customer-facing if it fails

keyResults.name: Critical UX bugs resolved (tooltip, timeline, calc channels)

timeAudit.weekSummary: Critical decision week: 5 open decisions requiring exec input by mid-April. Heavy context-switching between scale issues, new products, and compliance.
alerts: 65k entry limit blocking multiple customers - needs immediate escalation
FedRAMP scope unknown - may disrupt H1 roadmap
Global nav rollout timing conflicts with Canvas GA target
Engineering capacity split across too many initiatives - recommend prioritization session
